meta.description: Hourly: list pending agency approvals via MCP and post a nudge to the notify channel. Read-only; no business logic. Scoped identity wf:stale-approval-chaser -> [agency.pendingApprovals]. Env: HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, AGENCY_TENANT_ID, NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "agency.pendingApprovals", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID } } }) }}
